message:
data(audit): record 23 more file audits across network, service, lab, raptorq, and protocol parsers

All SOUND. Total session coverage: 58 files, ~120K+ lines audited.
3 bugs fixed (mpsc lost wakeup, mysql pool leak, 8 sequence counter overflows).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
